response.justification: Bogdan Szabo lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on the Windows platform (5–10 years) required for this role. While he has C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments), it is limited (less than 2 years total) and not focused on Windows systems. His domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income is also absent, and his recent work has been primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang. The mismatch with core requirements outweighs his strengths in other areas.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with diverse language experience (C++, Dlang, Java, TypeScript).
Proven ability to work in fast-paced environments with CI/CD practices and modern tooling.
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows platform (only ~1.5 years total, not recent).
No domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking.
Recent work heavily focused on scripting languages (TypeScript, Python-like use) rather than systems programming.

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in capital markets/fixed income
